nasb.text: Like one who takes a dog by the ears Is he who passes by and meddles with strife not belonging to him.

esv.text: Whoever meddles in a quarrel not his own is like one who takes a passing dog by the ears.

cnv.text: 過路的人被激怒，去干涉與自己無關的爭執， 就像人揪住狗的耳朵。

ccb.text: 插手他人的纠纷， 犹如揪狗的耳朵。

csbs.text: 过路人卷入与自己无关的争辩， 就如人去揪住狗的耳朵。
